🎤 Two Pitch Openers (× 2 framings each = 4 variants)

Pitch 1 — Website bait
"Hey it's Scott, I build websites for {niche} in {state}.
Noticed {business} doesn't have one."
+ "I know it sounds crazy but I threw one together real quick. Want to see it?"

Pitch 2 — Pay-on-results
"Hey it's Scott, saw {business} in {state}.
I help {niche} pros book more jobs, pay on results."
+ "Want me to show you how?"
